name: 吴俊鵬
current_positions: Chief Executive Officer of Singapore Airlines
Chief Executive Officer of Singapore Airlines Cargo
Board of Directors member of Mastercard
Member of NUS Board of Trustees

education.degree: MSc in Electrical Engineering and Computer Science
education.field: computer science, management science, cognitive science

work_experience.position: Various roles over 20+ years: SVP Commercial Technology, SVP Information Technology, EVP Marketing, Chairman of SilkAir

person_relationships.description: Succeeded Chew Choon Seng as CEO of Singapore Airlines in 2011
Led SIA's joint venture with Tata Group to form Vistara, subsequently merged with Air India (SIA holds 25.1% stake)

major_achievements.achievement: Won the Asia-Pacific Airline CEO of the Year award at CAPA Awards
Received the Eisenhower Global Innovation Award
Named Outstanding Chief Executive Officer of the Year
Won Best CEO for companies with $1 billion or more in market capitalisation
Received the CEO Lifetime Achievement Award
Awarded the Excellence in Leadership Award at ATW Airline Industry Achievement Awards
Led SIA to record annual profit of S$2.68 billion in fiscal year 2023-2024

biography_summary: Goh Choon Phong is a Singaporean businessman who has been CEO of Singapore Airlines since 2011. An MIT alumnus (MSc in Computer Science), he joined SIA after graduation and spent over 20 years in various roles including operations in China and Scandinavia, SVP of Commercial Technology, SVP of IT, EVP of Marketing, and Chairman of SilkAir. As CEO, he led SIA through post-2008 expansion, COVID-19 recovery, and record profits (S$2.68 billion in FY2023-24). He oversaw the consolidation of Tigerair and Scoot, the merger of SilkAir into SIA, and the Vistara/Air India joint venture with Tata Group. He is an independent director of Mastercard and serves on NUS Board of Trustees. Widely recognised with multiple industry awards including CAPA CEO of the Year (2015), Outstanding CEO (2017), and ATW Excellence in Leadership (2024).

collection_meta.notes: Enriched with comprehensive career milestones, major industry awards (2015-2024), business partnerships (Tata/Vistara), record profit achievement from Wikipedia and web search
